reasoning: As I do not have access to live search up to the May 2025 cutoff, I apply the law of iterated expectations: my best estimate for the conditional probability in May 2025 is my current best estimate of the event occurring before July 1, 2025. Rippling raised a $200M Series F in April 2024, giving it plenty of runway and reducing the immediate necessity to go public. While 2025 is anticipated to be a stronger IPO year, the July 1 deadline captures only the first half of the year. Historically, mega-unicorns with fresh funding wait for an ideal window, often late in the year. Thus, there is roughly a 20-30% chance they file their S-1 or formally announce before July 2025. I settle on 25% as the most balanced estimate.
